description: Donut chart driven by DuckDB SQL query.

sql.description: DuckDB SQL query with {{udf_name}} and $param_name placeholders. Must return 'label' and 'value' columns.

innerRadius.description: Inner radius in pixels (donut hole size).

showCenterTotal.description: Show total value text in donut center.

animationMs.description: Animation duration in milliseconds. 0 disables animation. Animation only plays on data changes, not on zoom/resize.

style.description: Inline CSS styles as a plain CSS string.
